---
title: "Single-Cell RNA-seq Analysis Report"
author: "Bioinformatics Core"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    theme: flatly
    embed-resources: true
    fig-width: 10
    fig-height: 6
jupyter: python3
execute:
  freeze: auto
---

<!-- Reference: Quarto 1.4+, scanpy 1.10+ | Verify API if version differs -->
<!-- jupyter-engine doc: parameters come from a cell tagged `parameters`, NOT a YAML params: block -->

```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]
input_file = "adata.h5ad"
n_top_genes = 2000
```

## Overview

This report presents single-cell RNA-seq analysis results, parameterized by `input_file`.

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
import scanpy as sc
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

sc.settings.verbosity = 0
sc.settings.set_figure_params(dpi=100, frameon=False)
```

## Data Loading

```{python}
#| label: load-data
adata = sc.read_h5ad(input_file)
print(f"Cells: {adata.n_obs:,}")
print(f"Genes: {adata.n_vars:,}")
```

## Quality Control {.panel-tabset}

### QC Metrics

```{python}
#| label: fig-qc
#| fig-cap: "Quality control metrics per cell"
sc.pl.violin(adata, ['n_genes_by_counts', 'total_counts', 'pct_counts_mt'], jitter=0.4, multi_panel=True)
```

### Filtering Summary

```{python}
#| label: tbl-filtering
#| tbl-cap: "Filtering statistics"
qc_stats = pd.DataFrame({
    'Metric': ['Total cells', 'Median genes/cell', 'Median counts/cell'],
    'Value': [adata.n_obs, int(np.median(adata.obs['n_genes_by_counts'])), int(np.median(adata.obs['total_counts']))],
})
qc_stats
```

## Dimensionality Reduction

```{python}
#| label: fig-umap
#| fig-cap: "UMAP embedding colored by Leiden cluster"
sc.pl.umap(adata, color='leiden', legend_loc='on data')
```

## Cluster Markers {.panel-tabset}

### Dotplot

```{python}
#| label: fig-markers
#| fig-cap: "Marker gene expression by cluster"
marker_genes = ['CD3D', 'CD14', 'CD19', 'NKG7', 'FCGR3A']
sc.pl.dotplot(adata, marker_genes, groupby='leiden', standard_scale='var')
```

### Heatmap

```{python}
#| label: fig-heatmap
#| fig-cap: "Top marker genes per cluster"
#| fig-height: 8
sc.tl.rank_genes_groups(adata, 'leiden', method='wilcoxon')
sc.pl.rank_genes_groups_heatmap(adata, n_genes=5, show_gene_labels=True)
```

The QC overview is @fig-qc; cluster structure is @fig-umap.

::: {.callout-note}
Cluster annotations should be validated with known marker genes before downstream interpretation.
:::

## Session Info

```{python}
#| label: session-info
print(f"Scanpy version: {sc.__version__}")
print(f"AnnData shape: {adata.shape}")
```
